message:
test(packs): cover \${repo_root} expansion happy path and outside-repo skip

Adds two unit tests for the new \${repo_root} substitution in
\`PacksConfig::expand_custom_paths\`:

- \`test_expand_custom_paths_repo_root_token\`: builds a temp directory
  containing a fake repo (`.git/` marker), drops a pack file at
  \`.dcg/packs/team.yaml\`, and verifies that
  \`expand_custom_paths_from(Some(subdir))\` walks up from a deeply
  nested subdir and resolves the pack file.
- \`test_expand_custom_paths_repo_root_no_repo\`: cwd is outside any
  repo. The \${repo_root} entry must be silently skipped (the
  fail-open contract for globally-deployed configs); a literal
  non-existent path entry alongside it should also drop out, leaving
  an empty resolved list.

Also documents the new token in the bundled default config:
\`\${repo_root}/.dcg/packs/*.yaml\` is now shown as a third example
under \`custom_paths\` (next to user packs and system-wide packs)
with a comment explaining it auto-discovers repo-local packs and
is safe to deploy via MDM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
